title: 1.21 update | Tricky Trials
description:
In this modification, I'm moving the 1.21 update to 1.20.1
Tricky Trials
body:
ANS130KM

# In this modification, I'm moving the 1.21 update to 1.20.1. 
-In version 1.0.0, I added a mace, an armor plate and a trial key, a heavy core, and a breeze rod
- In version 1.1.0, I added a chiseled copper, copper grate, ominous effect, bogged, wind charge

# A  [ geckolib ](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib), [copper blubs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/copper-bulbs)  mod is required
